timestamp: 2026-01-04T12:00:00Z
name: Wiki Wallpaper Automater
description: A collection of notes and learnings about automating the process of fetching and setting the daily wallpaper from Wikimedia

steps.name: Call the WikiMedia API
steps.description:
Note that the header requirements are quite strict and you need to generate an
API key Outputs:
input.wikiJson
input.imageUrl
steps.originalDescription:
Note that the header requirements are quite strict and you need to generate an

steps.name: Download the Image
steps.description: Now that we have a reference to the image of the day, we can use the "download" Deno library to save the image from Wikimedia locally
steps.originalDescription: Now that we have a reference to the image of the day, we can use the "download" Deno library to save the image from Wikimedia locally

steps.name: Set Wallpaper
steps.description:
Finally, we the super Dax library to run a simple (awkward af) Applescript to save override the current wallpaper.
I can't overstate how much Googling it took to find a workable `osascript` command. Need to dig into the AppleScript documentation at some point!
steps.originalDescription:
Finally, we the super Dax library to run a simple (awkward af) Applescript to save override the current wallpaper.
I can't overstate how much Googling it took to find a workable `osascript` command. Need to dig into the AppleScript documentation at some point!
